ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How do I install Neo4j?'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'Software'}),
    p2 = (q)-[r2:ASKED]->(u:User {display_name: 'TechExplorer'}),
    p3 = (q)-[r3:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {title: 'Use the official installer'})-[r4:ANSWERED]->(q2:Question {title: 'Best practice for database setup'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How did the user "TechExplorer" answer the question about Neo4j installation, and which follow-up question did they reference for best practices in database setup?

cypher: MATCH (u:User {display_name: 'TechExplorer'})-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)-[:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer)-[:ANSWERED]->(f:Question)\nWHERE q.title CONTAINS 'Neo4j installation' AND f.title CONTAINS 'database setup'\nRETURN q, a, f
